Short Description: Admin can create a flight with a departure time in the past (login with email: admin@gmail.com / password: Cong23032004*)
Sequence Actions:
- Login admin = Fill email + Fill password + Click Login(3 bước)
- Click "Manage Flights"
- Click "+ New Flight".
- Fill "F2" in Flight Number.
- Select "BOE-787-9 Dreamliner" from the Aircraft dropdown.
- Fill "80" into Base Price
- Select "Ha Noi (GL-HN)" from Departure Location
- Select "Da Nang (DN-DN)" from Arrival Location
- Set Departure Date/Time to "2026-01-28 03:31 PM".
- Set Arrival Date/Time to "2026-01-30 03:31 PM".
- Click "Save".
- Click CloseDialog
Loại lỗi: Lỗi kết quả chức năng hoặc dữ liệu hiển thị
Chú ý: Login admin/user = Fill email/username + Fill password + Click Login => tính là 3 bước
